name: spideriq
description: SpiderIQ agent skills — install once, get every SpiderIQ product's procedural knowledge inside Gemini CLI. Multi-skill suite: spiderpublish (multi-tenant CMS + booking runtime), send-receive-email (SpiderMail: run one inbox or a fleet — send/reply/forward, templates, warmup), use-the-gateway (SpiderGate LLM routing), and more. Triggers on phrases like 'create a landing page', 'check my inbox and reply', 'set up a contact form', or a tenant name (sms-chemicals.com, demo.spideriq.ai).
